ipv4-default.description: Legacy IPv4 examples continue to compile and build without requiring any new control-plane capability.

ipv6-core.description: Repository-level IPv6 readiness is tracked here, but this K8s integration branch does not currently carry a representative IPv6 example or runtime probe.
ipv6-core.notes: Keep declared as a gap until native IPv6 topology/API coverage or another representative IPv6 example is added.

routing-bird-frr.description: BIRD/FRR interoperability coverage from the source CI framework is not currently carried by this K8s integration branch.
routing-bird-frr.notes: Keep declared as a gap until the branch includes a maintained BIRD/FRR example and matching runtime probe.

exabgp-service.description: ExaBGP coverage exists on the source CI framework branch, but this K8s integration branch does not carry ExaBgpService or its examples.
exabgp-service.notes: Keep declared as a gap until ExaBGP service support is present on this branch.

looking-glass.description: Looking Glass service support is present, but the source CI framework examples are not present on this K8s integration branch.
looking-glass.notes: Keep declared as a gap until the representative Looking Glass example is merged here.

dns-endpoint.description: DNS endpoint behavior is represented by the mini Internet plus DNS example.

legacy-guard.description: Removed legacy control-plane API guards exist on the source CI framework branch, but those tests are not present on this K8s integration branch.
legacy-guard.notes: Keep declared as a gap until control-plane guard tests are merged here.

basic-a00-simple-as.description: Small IPv4 default behavior smoke example.

internet-b02-mini-internet-with-dns.description: Mini Internet with DNS component and local DNS endpoints.
